title: Single Ingredient Lot
description: One chili flakes lot touches a single production run — bounded, manageable impact.

title: Shared Ingredient Across Product Lines
description: One chili lot used across multiple SKUs in multiple product lines. The gut-punch scenario: blast radius scales non-linearly.

title: Packaging Lot Spanning Everything
description: One label run applied across batches regardless of ingredient. Every SKU sharing that label is implicated.
